sections.sectionTitle: Gimna a Thuak, Kisik mipa' Thungetna

verses.text: Topa aw, a hehsa-in kei hong taii kei in la, lungsosa-in kei hong thuhilh kei in
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma thaltangte ka sungah hong tum khin a, ka tungah na khuttum hong tu khinta hi
Nangma hehna hangin kei ka ci na a, ka mawhna hangin ka pumtangin ka na hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka mawhnate in ka lu dong hong tuumzo a, keima puak dingin a giklua vangik tawh kibang hi
Ka haina hangin ka liamnate nai-in uih a
keimah hong kikunsak a, hong kibokcipsak hi. Sunthapai-in kapin ka vak kawikawi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka ci sa mahmah a, nakpi takin ka ci na hi
Kei hong kinengcip gawpin ka thahatna beimang khin a, ka lungsim gimna hangin thumin ka tautau hi
Topa aw, ka deihna khempeuh na thei a, ka khuisatnate na za hi
Ka lungtang kisat a, ka tha in lel hi. Ka mit in zong khua mu thei nawnlo hi
Ka gim thuakna-ah ka lawmte leh ka kithuahpihte kidang koih uh a, keima behte nangawn kei kiang pan gamla om uh hi
Kei a hong that nuamte in a thang uh zak a, kei' natna ding a zongte in siatna ding thu bek gen uh a, sunthapai-in khemna bekbek ngaihsutin nei uh hi
Ahih hangin kei pen bilngong ka bang a, khua ka za kei hi. A kam a ka theilo, a pau theilo mi ka bang hi
Bil khua zalo, tawn'na kam a za theilo mi khat tawh kei ka kibang takpi hi
Ahih hangin Topa aw, nangmah ka hong muang hi. Topa ka Pasian aw, a hong dawng dingpa nangmah na hi hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh, “Ka khe a taal ciangin kei tunga hong kihisakte, keima gim thuakna-ah lungdam sak kei in,” cih bek ka hong thum hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh puk dingin ka kithawi a, ka gimna kam tuanlo hi
Ka thumanlohna ka pulak a, ka mawhna hangin ka dah hi
A thuman lopi-in ka gal a hite thahat a, kei a hong mudah khialte tam mahmah uh hi
A hoih gamta ka hih manin ka hoihna pen siatna tawh a hong thukte ka langpangte ahi hi
Topa aw, kei hong nusia kei in. Ka Pasian aw, ka kiang pan gamla om ke'n
Topa, kei hong honpa aw, keimah a hong huh dingin hong manlang in.
